rules: Use relaxed leading for body text
Avoid Inter for main headings; use Manrope for character
Ensure full height (h-full) for all children to avoid jagged bottoms

customization_rules: Cards: Use 'rounded-xl' and 'shadow-sm' (subtle). Avoid heavy drop shadows.
Buttons: Use 'rounded-lg' (slightly softer than default). Primary buttons should be Indigo-950.
Inputs: 'bg-slate-50' for input fields to differentiate from card background.
Tables: Clean, minimal borders. Header text should be 'text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500'.
Badges: Use soft backgrounds (bg-opacity-10) with strong text colors for status indicators.

specific_components.charts: Use Recharts (via shadcn/charts) for performance trends

assets.icons: Use lucide-react (default) or @phosphor-icons/react for a more polished look if needed.

universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': Do not use generic centered layouts or default blue gradients.
Micro-interactions: Add hover states to all interactive elements (e.g., table rows, cards).
Accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratio is at least 4.5:1. Use data-testid for all interactive elements.
Data Visualization: Charts must be clean and labeled. Don't rely on color alone.
Feedback: Use Toasts for success/error messages. Do not use native alerts.
Empty States: Always design empty states for tables/lists (e.g., 'No reviews found').
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the dashboard using a Sidebar Layout. The main content area should use a light gray background (bg-slate-50) to make the white cards pop. Use the 'Manrope' font for all headings to give it a distinct personality. Ensure the 'Warning' system uses the defined Danger colors clearly but professionally.
